invariants.text: forall i: int, j: int {:trigger (i, j)} :: (i, j) in counted ==> i < a
forall i: int, j: int {:trigger (i, j)} :: (i, j) in crossSet && i < a ==> (i, j) in counted
forall i: int, j: int {:trigger (i, j)} :: (i, j) in counted ==> i < a || (i == a && j < b)
forall i: int, j: int {:trigger (i, j)} :: (i, j) in crossSet && (i < a || (i == a && j < b)) ==> (i, j) in counted

assertions.text: forall a: int, b: int {:trigger IsCrossAt(M, n, a, b)} | 0 <= a < n && 0 <= b < n :: !IsCrossAt(M, n, a, b)
forall i: int, j: int {:trigger (i, j)} :: (i, j) in counted ==> i < a || (i == a && j <= b)
forall i: int, j: int {:trigger (i, j)} :: (i, j) in crossSet ==> i <= n - 2
forall i: int, j: int {:trigger (i, j)} :: (i, j) in crossSet ==> (i, j) in counted

children.text: crossSet := set a: int, b: int {:trigger (a, b)} {:trigger IsCrossAt(M, n, a, b)} | 0 <= a < n && 0 <= b < n && IsCrossAt(M, n, a, b) :: (a, b)
